question_text: What is the one thing you need most from me that you rarely ask for?
How has your definition of love changed since we got together?
What is your biggest fear about our future together?
In what ways do you think we bring out the best in each other?
What personal dream do you most want us to share together someday?
When do you feel most loved and seen by me?
What is one value you hope we always share, no matter how much we grow?
What does emotional safety mean to you in our relationship?
If you could change one thing about the way we communicate, what would it be?
What do you secretly wish I understood better about you?
How do you want us to grow individually while still growing together?
What sacrifice have you made for our relationship that you are proudest of?
What does a truly fulfilling life look like to you, and do I fit into that picture?
When was the last time you felt completely at peace with us?
What habit or quality in me has positively influenced your own life?
What are you still afraid to be completely honest with me about?
How do you picture our relationship in ten years?
What is the most important lesson your parents' relationship taught you about love?
What does forgiveness look like to you, and do you feel we practice it well?
What part of yourself do you think you have hidden from me?
How do you prefer to be comforted when you are going through something hard?
What does commitment truly mean to you beyond just staying together?
What is one thing you have learned about yourself through loving me?
Where do you find your sense of purpose, and how can I better support it?
What role does spirituality or faith play in how you approach our relationship?
How do you want us to handle disagreements differently going forward?
What is your love language, and do you feel I speak it well enough?
What kind of legacy do you want us to build together?
What is one thing you would tell your younger self about love?
How do you want to be remembered by me if we are ever separated?
What boundaries do you need me to respect more consistently?
What does vulnerability mean to you, and do you feel safe being vulnerable with me?
What is the hardest emotion for you to express to me, and why?
What small act of mine has meant the most to you that I might not even know about?
If money were no object, what kind of life would you design for us?
What is one personal goal you have been putting off that you wish I would encourage more?
How do you feel about where we are in life right now compared to where you hoped we would be?
What do you think is the foundation that makes our relationship strong?
What would you like us to do more of together to keep our connection deep?
How do you define intimacy outside of the physical?
What is one insecurity you have that you hope I help ease rather than trigger?
Do you feel we make decisions as a true team? What could be better?
What is the most meaningful compliment I have ever given you?
If you could read my mind about one thing, what would you choose?
What is one relationship pattern from your family you want to break with us?
How do you feel about the balance of independence and togetherness in our relationship?
What does growing old with me look like in your mind?
What is one thing you are grateful for about the way I show up for you?
When you imagine your ideal version of us, what does it look like?
What is one conversation we have been avoiding that you think we need to have?
What does trust look like in action to you in our daily life?
How do you want us to support each other during life's most difficult moments?
What parts of your personality do you think I still have not fully discovered?
What is one thing about your mental or emotional health you wish I knew more about?
What does quality time look like to you, and are we getting enough of it?
How important is financial transparency to you in our relationship?
What is a personal value of yours that you feel we do not discuss enough?
In what areas of life do you feel we are most aligned?
What does your ideal morning together look like?
What is something you have forgiven me for that you never fully told me?
How has loving me changed the way you see yourself?
What is your biggest relationship need that you feel embarrassed to ask for?
What does passion look like to you beyond romance?
How do you think we balance each other out in the most important ways?
What is one belief you hold about relationships that has changed since we met?
What does a healthy argument look like to you, and do we ever achieve it?
What is one thing you want to achieve before we reach the end of our lives together?
What does success in our relationship look like to you five years from now?
Is there anything about me that has surprised you in a deeply positive way?
What role does gratitude play in how you experience our relationship day to day?
What is something you have been wanting to try together but have been too nervous to suggest?
What is the most important thing I could do to make you feel more cherished?
Do you feel our relationship brings you more peace or more tension, and why?
What does adventure mean to you, and how can we bring more of it into our life?
What is one way I could be a better partner to you starting tomorrow?
What does your most peaceful evening with me look like?
How do you think we would handle a major life crisis together, and are you confident in us?
What kind of environment do you need at home to feel emotionally recharged?
What is one thing about yourself you are still working on, and how can I support that growth?
Do you feel we respect each other's individuality enough?
What is one experience you would like us to have before we turn the next big age milestone?
What does loyalty mean to you beyond fidelity?
How do you feel we handle each other's stress, and what could be improved?
What is something I do that helps you feel grounded when life feels overwhelming?
What is an unspoken expectation in our relationship you wish we would talk about openly?
What is the relationship standard you hold us to that you are most proud of?
How do you feel about the pace at which our relationship has evolved?
What is one tradition you hope we create together that we have not started yet?
When you feel distant from me, what do you wish I would do?
What does unconditional love feel like to you in practical terms?
How do you cope with loneliness, and do you ever feel lonely even when we are together?
What is one thing you hope we never lose, no matter how much time passes?
How does your sense of identity feel when you are in this relationship?
What is the most important way you want to show up for me that you are still working toward?
What does healing look like in our relationship when we have hurt each other?
What is something you have never told anyone else that you could share with me now?
In what ways do you think love is a choice, and how do you choose us every day?
What is one fear about yourself that you worry could affect our relationship?
How do you want us to evolve as individuals over the next decade while keeping our bond strong?
What does home mean to you, and does being with me feel like home?
What is one thing about my personality that you think makes me uniquely right for you?
How do you handle your inner critic, and does our relationship help or complicate that?
What is your greatest hope for the kind of life we build together?
When did you first realize that what we have is something truly special?
What is one way you feel we could deepen our emotional intimacy right now?
What does joy look like in our relationship, and are we experiencing enough of it?
What aspect of my character do you most want to reflect in yourself?
How do you feel about where we are spiritually, philosophically, or existentially as a couple?
What is one thing you need me to believe about you that you are not sure I do?
How would you describe the shape of our relationship to a friend?
What does showing up for someone fully look like to you?
What is one thing in our daily routine you wish had more intention behind it?
When you think about our happiest version, what does that couple look like?
What is one thing you would change about how we spend our evenings together?
What does respect look like to you in a romantic relationship, and do we model it well?
How do you feel about the role of humor and lightness in keeping us connected?
What is one thing you are actively doing to be a better partner right now?
What is the most courageous thing you have ever done for love?
What does it mean to you when I say I am proud of you?
How do you want to handle grief or loss together if it ever comes to us?
What is one way our relationship has surprised you that you never anticipated?
If you could write a letter to our future selves to be opened in 20 years, what would you say?
If we were characters in a sitcom, what would our show be called?
What is my go-to karaoke song whether I admit it or not?
If we could only eat one cuisine for the rest of our lives, what would you choose for us?
What is the most ridiculous argument we have ever had over something tiny?
If I were an animal, what animal would I be and why?
What is my most predictable habit that I do not even notice?
If we could live in any decade from history, which one would you pick?
What would our couples costume be if we had to dress up tonight?
Would you rather explore space or the deep ocean together, and why?
What is something I do that you find secretly adorable but have never told me?
If our relationship had a theme song, what would it be?
What movie could we quote perfectly together start to finish?
If we opened a business together, what would it be?
What is my absolute worst opinion that I am convinced is correct?
If you had to describe me using only three emojis, which would you pick?
What is the funniest misunderstanding we have ever had?
If we were both superheroes, what would our powers be?
What is the most embarrassing thing I have done in public that still makes you laugh?
Would you rather go on a luxury resort vacation or a backpacking adventure together?
What reality TV show do you think we would absolutely win together?
If we were on a deserted island and you could only bring five items, what would they be?
What is my weirdest food combination that I insist is delicious?
If we could swap one of each other's personality traits, which would you take from me?
What talent do I have that would totally surprise a stranger?
If our life together were a movie genre, what genre would it be?
What is one thing you do that you are pretty sure drives me a little crazy?
If we could each pick any celebrity to join us for dinner, who would you pick?
Who is more likely to get lost without GPS?
Who takes longer to get ready, and do we both secretly know the answer?
If we competed on a trivia game show, what category would each of us dominate?
What is one word your friends would use to describe me that might surprise you?
If you could redesign our ideal home from scratch, what three rooms would it definitely have?
What fictional couple from TV or film do we remind you of the most?
What is the strangest compliment you have ever received from me?
Would we survive a zombie apocalypse together, and who would be more useful?
What is my signature move when I am trying to get my way?
If we had a pet that could talk, what do you think it would say about us?
What is the most spontaneous thing we have ever done together?
If I had my own cooking show, what would it be called?
What is the one board game or card game that would end our relationship if we played competitively?
What nickname would you give me that perfectly sums me up in one word?
If our lives had a laugh track, when would it play the most?
What is something I have said in my sleep that you will never let me forget?
Who would be more likely to accidentally start a mild diplomatic incident abroad?
If we could travel to any fictional world together, where would we go?
What is your go-to order at a restaurant, and could I have guessed it correctly?
What is something I am terrible at that I absolutely refuse to admit?
If you could plan our perfect lazy day at home, what would it look like?
Which one of us is more likely to cry at a commercial?
What is a hobby you would want us to start together that we have not tried yet?
If I were a dish, what would I be and what are the key ingredients?
What is the most dramatic thing I have done over something totally minor?
If we had a dollar for every time I said a certain phrase, how rich would we be?
Would you rather we win the lottery or an all-expenses-paid trip around the world?
What is my most embarrassing guilty pleasure that you have caught me enjoying?
If we were in a horror movie, who would be the first to investigate the strange noise?
What is the best inside joke we share that nobody else would understand?
If you could teach me any skill in one day, what would you teach me?
What is something I buy too much of that you just shake your head at?
Which one of us would win in a staring contest?
If we could only watch one streaming service for a year, which would you choose?
What is the weirdest dream you remember having that involved me?
If we entered a couples cooking competition, what dish would we make and would we win?
What is my weirdest pet peeve that you have just accepted as part of me?
If we could only listen to one music artist for a month, who would you pick for both of us?
Who is the better driver, and does the other one actually agree?
What is a quirky rule you would add to our relationship if you could?
What compliment do I give you so often that you could predict my next one right now?
If we had to trade jobs for a week, whose week would be harder?
What is the most creative excuse I have ever come up with to get out of something?
Which one of us is more likely to get distracted mid-task by something shiny?
If our relationship had a mascot, what would it be?
What is a game show you think I would spectacularly fail at?
If we could hire any celebrity as our personal chef for a week, who would you pick?
What is the most ambitious plan we have made together that never quite happened?
If you could give me one hall pass to do something ridiculous without judgment, what would it be?
What is something I always forget, no matter how many times I am reminded?
If we competed in the Olympics, which sport would each of us enter?
What is the most creative date idea you have ever thought of but never suggested?
Which one of us is more likely to become obsessed with a new hobby for exactly three weeks?
If we could add one ridiculous room to our house, what would it be?
What is a phrase I say so often it has become a running joke between us?
If you could swap our personalities for a day, what is the first thing you would do?
Which one of us would be voted most likely to befriend a random stranger within five minutes?
What is the most unexpected thing you have learned about me that still surprises you?
If our relationship had a smell, what would it be?
What is the silliest thing we have ever laughed about so hard we could not breathe?
If I had a warning label, what would it say?
What is my most stubborn strongly-held opinion about something that does not matter at all?
Who falls asleep faster, and is that person aware of how quickly it happens?
If we could teleport to any restaurant in the world for dinner tonight, where would you take us?
What is one completely harmless secret you have been keeping from me just for fun?
Which one of us would be a better villain in a heist movie?
What is the most chaotic trip or outing we have had that ended up being unforgettable?
If you could redesign my wardrobe, what is the first thing you would throw out?
What is the funniest photo of us that exists somewhere?
If I wrote a book, what would the title be based on my personality?
What weird habit of mine have you actually started adopting yourself?
If you had to bet on it, who would outlast the other in a silent treatment competition?
What is one food I claimed to hate that you are pretty sure I actually enjoy?

What is the most creative gift I have ever given you, intentional or accidental?
Which one of us is more likely to be best friends with the neighbors before they even unpack?
What would each of our catchphrases be if we had one?
If you could bet on which one of us would win a dance-off, who would you back?
What is the most dramatic face I make that you could impersonate right now?
If we had to survive on a cooking budget of five dollars each for a week, who would eat better?
What animal do you think I would choose as a pet if all animals were domesticated?
What is something I am irrationally competitive about?
If we could only ever watch one genre of movie together, what would you vote for?
What is a strange talent of yours that I might not even know about?
If our home were an amusement park, what would the main attraction be?
What is the most ridiculous plan we have hatched together at a late hour that seemed genius at the time?
Who is more likely to panic if the Wi-Fi goes out for an entire day?
What is the funniest thing you have ever caught me doing when I thought no one was watching?
If we had to create a time capsule just for each other to open in ten years, what would you put in yours for me?
What is my biggest irrational fear that you find endearing rather than alarming?
If you could clone me for one specific purpose, what would that clone be in charge of?
What is one thing about me that works exactly the same way every single time?
If our relationship had a theme park ride, would it be a roller coaster, a lazy river, or a Ferris wheel?
